title: Get Change Artifact
description: Monaco needs file bytes plus the hash for the next save, but HTTP delivery must stay thin. `GetChangeArtifact` wraps repository reads with the same tracked-file confinement as save so handlers never reach into `ChangeRepository` ad hoc.
context: Monaco needs file bytes plus the hash for the next save, but HTTP delivery must stay thin. `GetChangeArtifact` wraps repository reads with the same tracked-file confinement as save so handlers never reach into `ChangeRepository` ad hoc.

rules:
The use case MUST load the change with `ChangeRepository.get(name)` and call `artifact(change, filename)`, returning `{ content, originalHash }` or a typed not-found error.

The use case MUST NOT call `ChangeRepository.mutate`, `save`, or any other persistence primitive that advances `updatedAt`.
The same tracked-file guard as `SaveChangeArtifact` MUST apply: untracked filenames MUST fail before read.

`execute` MUST be a read operation with no manifest side effects.

Repeated invocations with unchanged artifact content MUST NOT advance `Change.updatedAt` or persist a manifest revision solely from the read.

scenarios.name: Tracked file returns content and hash
given: proposal.md is tracked on change foo

scenarios.name: Read does not call mutate
then: loads change via get and artifact bytes via artifact
AND does not invoke ChangeRepository.mutate or save

scenarios.name: Untracked filename fails before read
when: filename is not tracked on the change manifest

scenarios.name: Repeated reads keep updatedAt stable
when: GetChangeArtifact runs twice for the same tracked filename
then: manifest updatedAt is unchanged after both reads

scenarios.name: HTTP GET artifact does not bump revision clock
when: no save or other mutation occurs between requests
then: subsequent GET /changes/{name}/status reports the same updatedAt
